---
title: "Sample Size Comparison: R as an alternative to East and nQuery ?"
bibliography: references.bibtex
---

@Halabi_Michiels_2020 is a book

This is a Quarto website.

To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.

```{r}
#| label: initialisation
#| echo: false
source("R/init.R")
library(plotly)
library(crosstalk)
```

```{r}
#| label: get-ssc-object
#| echo: false
ssc <- read_rds("ssc.rds")
```

```{r}
surv_fixed <- ssc$surv$fixed$combined |> get_tbl()
p <- ggplot(surv_fixed) +
    aes(x = n_east, y = n_rpact) +
    geom_point()
    
plotly::ggplotly(p)
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
shared_surv_fixed <- SharedData$new(surv_fixed)
filter_select("relevancy", "Relevancy:", shared_surv_fixed, ~ relevancy)
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
plot_ly(shared_surv_fixed) |> 
add_trace(
    x = ~ n_east,
    y = ~ n_rpact,
    type = "scatter",
    mode = "markers"
)
```
